edition_notes: First edition was ~3 years ago on Tiago's private property, <100 people, public event with municipal license but small scale, rained heavily. This is the first 'Lua Nova' themed edition — Beat Nonstop is the brand/franchise.

concept.core: New moon — event falls on the actual new moon date
concept.vibe: Manifestation ritual with electronic music. Opening a new cycle. Cosmic/celestial decor and atmosphere.
concept.note: Not all spiritual themes need to be explicit on public website — some are internal guiding principles

venue.name: Ribeira do Neiva
venue.location: Duas Igrejas, Vila Verde, Braga, Portugal
venue.indoor_outdoor: outdoors (open air), with indoor backstage/private zone
venue.history: Multiple successful parties thrown at this location before — known quantity

tickets.target_notes: 1000 is aspirational. Team wants maximum safe attendance.
tickets.pricing_model: FLAT — no Early Bird, no Pre-sale, no Door differentiation. Same price from launch through door.

general.note: Flat rate, all ages 13+, unlimited quantity up to venue cap

duo_pack.note: Group ticket of 2 — €10 each. Uses Shotgun Group Ticket feature. Each attendee gets own QR.

vip.status: DEFERRED — add after stage platform layout confirmed with vendor. Tiago needs to know platform count and size first.

tshirt_pack.status: DEFERRED — launch later once merch design is finalized

tickets.platform: Shotgun.live via embedded widget on beatnonstop.live (own the checkout experience)
tickets.scanning_system: QR code scanning via Shotgun app at door, physical buyers get wristbands

lineup.composition: 2 rappers + 5 DJs (spectrum house → techno, including Tiago himself)
lineup.locations: Amarante, Barcelos, Braga area — all local, no travel needed, all handle own transport
lineup.confirmed: All 7 artists confirmed — names TBD (Tiago will provide list). Includes: Sun Profile, Kika Lewis, John (paid), Pia Zola (Tiago), plus 3 others
lineup.contracts: NO formal contracts — friend-based/trust arrangement. Tiago is a DJ himself, knows all of them personally
lineup.legal_structure: Event organized through partnership with local parish/church organization (Duas Igrejas) — they use their NIF (tax ID). On paper connected to their August party. This is municipality-sanctioned community organizing, not black market.
lineup.set_order: NOT YET DETERMINED — needs AI help to propose an industry-standard schedule mixing rappers + house→techno progression

payment.model: Cash payment, no contracts, 50% in advance to guarantee commitment (Tiago's standard practice)

paid_artists.note: Tiago mentioned 1500 total in one breath, 300+400+750=1450 — verify exact split

unpaid_artists.compensation: Reputation, exposure, food, drinks, logistics covered — they break even and play for visibility

payment.success_bonus: If event goes well, €100 bonus to each of 6 artists (Tiago excluded, he's one of the artists). Total potential bonus pool: €600
payment.risk_note: No contracts means no legal recourse if artist pulls out. AI should flag best practices to minimize this risk (e.g., confirmation messages, 50% upfront, clear comms)

lineup.technical_riders: Single unified equipment setup covers all artists — provided by external company (see vendors)

budget.estimated_total_range: 7000-8000 EUR (Tiago has detailed calculation on paper — to be photographed and shared)
budget.biggest_cost: Sound + lights + DJ equipment package: €3000 total, €1500 required UPFRONT before event to secure equipment delivery

payment_horizons.before_event: €1500 (50% equipment deposit) — FUNDED, artist 50% deposits (~€725), marketing team already paid 50%? TBD
payment_horizons.day_of: Security, remaining equipment balance, potentially bar setup costs (handled by municipality)
payment_horizons.after_event: Artist bonuses (if successful), any remaining balances

budget.critical_cashflow_problem_RESOLVED: €1500 equipment deposit is now available (resolved 2026-04-12). Event is unblocked for commitment.
budget.goal: Break-even minimum, profit goes to next edition
budget.profitability_stance: Passion project but break-even is non-negotiable. Profit = reinvest in Edition 3.

core_organizers.name: Tiago
core_organizers.role: Co-lead — artists, stage, sound, music programming. Also a performing DJ (Pia Zola). Employer has aluminum/construction company — can contribute materials for stage props (e.g., big moon logo).

core_organizers.name: David
core_organizers.role: Co-lead — money, tickets, entry, logistics, organization. Has access to van (from father's work) for equipment transport.

former_organizer.status: Dropped from core team — reliability concerns
former_organizer.resolution: No longer part of decision-making. May help with small tasks if everything goes smoothly, but plan must be independent of his contribution.
former_organizer.residual_issue: The €3k cash gap is somehow connected to this dynamic

team.decision_authority: David + Tiago jointly — no single lead, they trust each other and coordinate
team.active_tensions: RESOLVED — former third organizer situation already navigated. No current blocking disagreements between David and Tiago.

community_support.headcount: ~25 people working the event (families, community helpers)
community_support.role: Bar operation, general staffing, day-of help

marketing_team.description: Two local women — Tiago's high school friend (Sarah?) and her friend
marketing_team.payment_structure: €500 upfront (already committed, may not yet be paid), €500 after event

responsibility_map.door_entry: TBD — needs a trusted friend, ideally female ('a pretty girl' per Tiago)
responsibility_map.bar: Duas Igrejas parish community (they keep bar profits)

venue_technical.sound_system: Rented via equipment company (part of €3000 package with lights + DJ gear)
venue_technical.sound_engineer: Equipment company provides their own technicians

power.primary: Tap from power lines — cables provided by stage crew ('illegal but everyone does it', done for all big parties locally, considered safer than generator)
power.backup: Generator available via municipality president if needed

stage.status: SEPARATE from sound package — still needs to be organized
stage.plan: Request from municipality president — they have a new stage they can lend
stage.action_needed: Tiago needs to talk to president

venue_technical.dj_equipment: All included in €3000 equipment package — mixer, CDJs, monitors, everything covered

toilets.mobile_dixies: Requesting from municipality president — not yet confirmed

venue_technical.bar_kitchen: Handled entirely by Duas Igrejas — they own operation, keep profits. Includes 1 free drink per ticket holder.
venue_technical.alcohol_license: Held by Duas Igrejas parish organization — their NIF, their license
venue_technical.parking: Large parking area in village, ~2 min walk to venue. Plenty of space.
venue_technical.accessibility: Not specifically addressed — open field, should be physically accessible

permit.status: Not yet issued, but easy to acquire — Duas Igrejas handles it through their standing relationship with câmara
permit.notes: Parish organization has existing rapport with municipality, routine for them

noise_curfew.reality: Location historically used for loud parties without police issues. Will inform police proactively + share license.

legal_safety.fire_safety: Open field with large access door for fire trucks and ambulances, streets closable. Low fire risk.
legal_safety.first_aid: NO PLAN YET — flagged as gap. AI should propose basic first aid coverage (volunteer with training, or contracted paramedic).

security.status: In active negotiation — Tiago spoke to security company manager yesterday, waiting on quote
security.expected_scale: For ~1000 attendees, TBD how many guards needed

insurance.status: Likely covered by Duas Igrejas under their parish organization umbrella — needs verification

legal_safety.problematic_attendees: Security team + trusted friends on hand
legal_safety.drug_policy: No formal policy — team personally against drugs but won't police it. No harm reduction resources planned.

instagram.target_growth: Significant — needs amplification before ticket launch in 2 days

channels.cross_posting: AI should automate cross-platform posting if possible

announced_publicly.rollout_plan: Announce artists one-by-one daily, then release the full poster (Cartache) as finale

marketing.poster_status: In production by marketing team — not yet released

press_contacts.status: Contacts exist, outreach pending release of poster
press_contacts.targets: Local Vila Verde journal, Vila Verde/Neiva area radio
press_contacts.strategy: Send email with poster once finalized

competing_events.on_may_16: One small local party, different target audience — no meaningful competition

marketing.assets_location: All promo material to be shared in repo

confirmed.contribution: Bar operation + 1 free drink per ticket + community staff + NIF/legal umbrella + permit pathway
Free fireworks synced to sound on event day

in_progress.contribution: Construction materials for stage props (e.g., giant moon logo)

sponsorship.desired: More local business sponsorship to close €3000 cash gap. Critical priority. AI should propose outreach list + pitch templates.
sponsorship.stage_sponsor_idea: Pitch municipality or big local business to sponsor the stage itself (e.g., naming)

age_restriction.current_thinking: No hard restriction. Families with kids common in the region. Under-16 possibly restricted, 16-18 with parents. But alcohol service complicates things (wristband system needed if no age gate). Team open to AI recommending best approach with pros/cons.
age_restriction.alcohol_control: Check at bar, not at entry — but needs proper system if minors allowed

guestlist.press: want to engage local press — journal of Vila Verde, radio of Vila Verde/Neiva area
guestlist.press_strategy: wants AI help with full press/media strategy — who to reach out to, benefits of press guest access, pre/during/post event coverage

weather.expectation: High chance of good weather for May 16 in Braga region
weather.contingency: Outdoor event with indoor backstage — no public rain plan

ai_help_requests: Optimal ticket count + tier distribution (currently targeting 1000, want maximum safe number)
Age restriction decision — pros/cons of 18+ vs mixed with wristbands
Press/media outreach strategy and contact research
Set order and time scheduling for 2 rappers + 5 DJs house→techno progression
Best practices when working without contracts (risk mitigation for artist no-shows)
How to solve €1500 upfront equipment payment cashflow problem
Sponsorship outreach: identify local businesses + draft pitch templates
First aid plan recommendation (this is a gap)
Cross-platform social media amplification (Facebook, TikTok, automation)
Ticket scanning + wristband sourcing best practices
Verify exact artist payment split (1450 vs 1500 discrepancy)

day_of_operations.setup_philosophy: Nothing heavy on event day itself. Everything ready the day before (May 15). Day-of is for receiving artists and handling surprises.
day_of_operations.load_in: Equipment company handles their own load-in and install — they know the job
day_of_operations.load_out: Equipment company handles — not David/Tiago's concern
day_of_operations.setup_timeline: TO BE GENERATED BY AI — derive from all vendor arrivals and backward-plan from 18:00 doors

success_definition.tiago_priority: FULL ROOM — non-negotiable, primary emotional goal. Don't get distracted by break-even thinking.
success_definition.david_priority: Break-even minimum + full room + community feeling — financial safety still matters
success_definition.synthesis: Full room is the headline goal. Break-even is a floor, not a ceiling. Profit if possible → Edition 3. Community talking about it afterward is success signal.
success_definition.content_capture: Marketing team (2 women) handle photography + after-movie

mailing_list.plan: Shotgun captures buyer emails automatically — use for post-event follow-up. Optional opt-in checkbox for future events.
mailing_list.platform_preference: Open to WhatsApp/Telegram later, but no server/infra right now — defer

domain.email: Proton Mail once domain is acquired (e.g., hello@beatnonstop.xx)
